Based on the zoomed-in view of atom C:22, I can identify the following covalently bonded neighbor atoms:

**Neighbor atoms of C:22:**
1. **Atom index 19** - Element: **C** (Carbon) - bonded to the left
2. **Atom index 27** - Element: **C** (Carbon) - bonded to the right/bottom
3. **Atom index 36** - Element: **H** (Hydrogen) - bonded above

**geomconf_index: 661**

The carbon atom C:22 appears to have 3 visible neighbors in this view (two carbons and one hydrogen). Carbon typically forms 4 bonds, so there may be a fourth bond that is obscured from this viewing angle or the structure may have a different bonding arrangement.

question: Please find neighbour atoms of atom index 22 (element: C). Neighbour atoms are covalently connected. Report their atomic indices and elements. Also return the geomconf_index.
